Special Category Intake Note - synthetic fixture only.
Client: Fictional CareWorks Pte. Ltd.
Reviewer: Dr Priya Raman.
Subject: Ms Lina Koh, employee wellness file.
Diagnosis: type 2 diabetes.
Medication: metformin.
Biometric template: fingerprint hash.
Genetic test result: BRCA1 positive.
Sexual orientation: bisexual.
Sexual history: disclosed to clinic intake nurse.
This synthetic note is not a real medical record.
